name: Armstrong Sports Park
description: Armstrong Sports Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Three Rivers, MI. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Coloma High School - Tennis Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Coloma High School - Tennis Courts in Colon, MI! There are 8 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Doyle Community Center
description: Doyle Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Sturgis, MI. There are 9 indoor hard and acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The courts can be reserved. Amenities include locker rooms, restrooms, water, youth programming, lights, trainers or lessons, and wheelchair accessibility.
fees: Fee required — $3 for members, $6 for non-members

name: Immaculate Conception Catholic Church School Gym
description: Immaculate Conception Catholic Church School Gym is a place to play pickleball in Three Rivers, MI. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Kline's Resort
description: Come play pickleball at Kline's Resort in Three Rivers, MI! There is 1 outdoor court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. A one-time fee is required to play.
